summary: Nilesh Vaghela is an AWS Community Hero Since 2017 and the CEO of Electromech Cloudtech Pvt. Ltd., leading cloud transformation, GenAI innovation, and enterprise modernization initiatives using AWS technologies. With around 28 years of experience in cloud computing, open-source platforms, and IT infrastructure, he has been instrumental in enabling businesses, startups, and individuals to leverage AWS for innovation and growth. -> Awarded “AWS Hero of the Year – APJ Region” in 2023, recognizing his outstanding contributions to -> community growth and knowledge sharing across the Asia-Pacific region. -> Founded the AWS User Group Ahmedabad in 2014, one of India’s earliest and most dynamic AWS user communities. -> Instrumental and active in AWS User Group Vadodara, fostering collaboration and continuous learning across Gujarat’s cloud ecosystem. -> Under his leadership, 12+ AWS Community Days have been successfully hosted across Ahmedabad and Vadodara, bringing together thousands of cloud professionals, students, and AWS enthusiasts. -> Delivered hundreds of workshops, meetups, and technical sessions, mentoring thousands of learners on AWS, DevOps, and Generative AI technologies. Regularly contributes as a speaker, mentor, and jury member at hackathons, AWS events, and community initiatives, inspiring builders to innovate responsibly and effectively on AWS.
